hero.badge: THE MARKET DOESN'T MEET EXPECTATIONS. THE MARKET CREATES CONDITIONS.
hero.subtitle: The investor doesn't decide — the investor reacts.
hero.title: Make market decisions based on conditions, not emotions.
hero.description: FXEduLab organizes market data, news, and scenarios so that before every decision you know what's happening, what's possible, and what matters.

home.hero_kicker: FXEDULAB · learning, certificate & panel in one access
home.hero_h1_before: Market education, a certificate, and decision tools — via
home.subheadline: Learn with courses and quizzes while the panel structures context: what’s happening, what may affect markets, and which scenario paths to consider. Your path can end with a certificate for your CV or LinkedIn. One licence — access through the NFT, no monthly subscription.
home.hero_highlights_aria: Three pillars of access: education, certificate, market panel
home.sales_paused_note: No spots available — primary NFT and access sales are paused for now.
home.payment_note: Pay in BTC / ETH / USDT. Access is tied to the NFT.
home.hero_nft_aria: Illustration of FXEDULAB Founders NFT card — full access to the education and decision platform
home.paths_title: How do you want to use FXEDULAB?
home.paths_direction: Most users start with learning or go straight to the decision panel.
home.paths_sub: Choose a path that fits your goal.
home.path_decisions_desc: Scenarios, checklists, and market context in one panel.
home.path_learn_desc: Courses and quizzes to understand how markets work.
home.path_cert_desc: The FXEDULAB exam and certificate to validate your knowledge.
home.benefits_sub: One-time access licence — tools and materials in one workflow.
home.benefit_0: A/B/C scenarios — three path variants before you decide
home.benefit_1: Checklists before you take a position
home.benefit_2: Macro, momentum, and headlines in one panel
home.benefit_3: One workflow: from context to checklist without hopping between tools
home.benefit_4: All platform modules under your access licence
home.benefit_5: One-time model — no monthly fee for NFT holders
home.step1_body: One-time payment in BTC, ETH, or USDT.
home.step2_body: Tools and materials are tied to your NFT.
home.step3_title: You use the system and transfer access together with the NFT
home.step3_body: Access is tied to the NFT and passes to the new owner.
home.platform_sub: A coherent tool system: panel, scenarios, checklists, and market context — you work in one place, not only read materials.
home.pf_0_desc: Market structure, momentum, and alerts — a quick picture before you decide.
home.pf_1_desc: Three named variants instead of one “sure” path.
home.pf_2_desc: A pre-entry checklist — fewer skipped steps.
home.pf_3_desc: Macro, headlines, and situational background in one view — educational and analytical.
home.cert_title: Verify your knowledge and earn the FXEDULAB certificate
home.cert_sub: Platform access opens the materials and tools. Certification is a separate, optional step: after working through the content you can check your knowledge in a final exam. With a passing result you generate an FXEDULAB certificate tied to the track you choose.
home.cert_c0_desc: The exam is not only dry theory — it centers scenarios and decisions, in the spirit of how you work with the material on the platform.
home.cert_c1_desc: Certification maps to specific areas, including Forex Fundamentals, Technical Analysis, and Risk Management.
home.cert_c2_desc: After a passing exam you can generate a certificate and view it on your account.
home.founders_price_line: Current NFT access price: {current} USD · next tier: {next} USD.
home.founders_body: Entering at an earlier stage means a better access threshold. Payment in BTC / ETH / USDT. The NFT grants ongoing platform access plus a monthly Insight refill — no monthly fee for access itself. The longer you hold the NFT, the more features you unlock. When you resell the token, access and unlocked benefits transfer to the new holder.
home.closing_title: Get FXEDULAB access through the Founders NFT
home.closing_desc: One-time access to the market decision system, scenarios, and tools organized in one place.
home.legal_1: The NFT is not a financial instrument within the meaning of applicable rules.
home.legal_2: Purchase does not mean equity in the company or any promise of a return.
home.legal_3: Platform content is for education and analysis only — not recommendations.
home.market_body: You can list your Founders NFT for sale. Another user may buy it — platform access and time-unlocked benefits transfer with the NFT. We do not promise secondary-market liquidity, we do not run a user buyback, and we do not guarantee price or that you can resell.
home.faq_intro: Briefly on access, payments, and legal status.
home.faq_0_a: You buy a Founders NFT linked to a full-access licence for FXEDULAB tools and materials on the platform — it is not company equity or a financial instrument.
home.faq_1_a: No. For NFT holders there is no monthly access fee — you pay when you buy the NFT (per current sale terms).
home.faq_2_q: Can I sell the NFT later?
home.faq_2_a: Yes, you can try to resell the NFT to another user; access moves with the NFT. We do not guarantee you will find a buyer or how long it may take.
home.faq_3_a: We do not treat the NFT as a financial instrument. It is a vehicle for platform access under a licence model.
home.faq_4_a: Reference payment in BTC, ETH, or USDT — checkout / purchase instructions provide the exact flow.

education_preview.hero_desc: Courses and quizzes from basics through risk — no signals or investment recommendations.
education_preview.hero_killer_line: Build real market understanding — instead of guessing direction.
education_preview.hero_social_proof: More and more people are building a decision process with FXEDULAB.
education_preview.hero_cert_caption: After passing the exam, you can generate your FXEDULAB certificate.
education_preview.hero_cert_proof_line: The certificate confirms completion of the path and passing the exam.
education_preview.hero_cert_use_line: It’s useful on your CV, in conversations about markets, and as a clear signal you know technical analysis in practice—not just from random videos.
education_preview.hero_value_0_desc: Forex fundamentals, technical analysis, risk, psychology, calendar, candlesticks — lessons and materials in the product.
education_preview.hero_value_1_desc: Short questions that reinforce concepts — not signal drills.
education_preview.hero_value_2_desc: Optional FXEDULAB certification: a formal exam, then your own credential document.
education_preview.hero_cta_microcopy: Start with modules — you can move on to quizzes and the exam later.
education_preview.hero_cta_cert_hint: The path can lead to the exam and an FXEDULAB certificate.
education_preview.hero_cta_reassurance: Start from the basics — no pressure, step by step.
education_preview.learn_intro: Four areas that connect into one system — from definitions to how you work with process.
education_preview.learn_0_title: You understand what actually moves price
education_preview.learn_0_desc: You don’t just see the chart — you understand what sits behind price moves and liquidity.
education_preview.learn_1_title: You read market structure, you don’t hunt for signals
education_preview.learn_1_desc: You can judge context and timing — without relying on off-the-shelf setups.
education_preview.learn_2_title: You control risk before you enter a position
education_preview.learn_2_desc: You know how much you’re risking, where you’re wrong, and how to respond across scenarios.
education_preview.learn_3_title: You make decisions instead of guessing
education_preview.learn_3_desc: You build your own process — from observation to action.
education_preview.learn_featured_kicker: This is the point where you start to really understand the market.
education_preview.process_intro: Order matters — each step closes out the previous one before you move on.
education_preview.process_0_title: You start from the basics and build a foundation
education_preview.process_0_desc: Lessons and materials stack knowledge in layers — from definitions to examples.
education_preview.process_1_title: You check whether you really understand the material
education_preview.process_1_desc: Short questions reinforce concepts — not signal-chasing drills.
education_preview.process_2_title: You cut through chaos and build your own framework
education_preview.process_2_desc: Gaps show up clearly, so you know what to revisit before the next module.
education_preview.process_3_title: You verify knowledge and earn your certificate
education_preview.process_3_desc: The exam is a separate step after the EDU path — deliberate verification, not a rush.
education_preview.courses_sub: A concise map of tracks in the service. Open a module below; full lessons and progress tracking after sign-in.
education_preview.course_0_desc: Currencies, pairs, spread, and operational context — the base for further modules and EDU materials.
education_preview.course_1_desc: Chart structure, levels, and interpretation without promises of “sure” signals.
education_preview.course_2_desc: Advanced modules: risk frames, scenarios, and exposure in an educational setting.
education_preview.course_3_desc: Decision process, cognitive pitfalls, and uncertainty — without motivational trading hype.
education_preview.course_4_desc: Macro releases, volatility, and session context — how to read the calendar when studying markets.
education_preview.course_5_desc: Patterns in the context of price structure; practice reading, not mechanical entry rules.
education_preview.audience_0_desc: You want a clear start from definitions and mechanics instead of a mess of shortcuts and social-media jargon.
education_preview.audience_1_desc: You already touch the market but want modules, a recap of basics, and to close gaps systematically.
education_preview.audience_2_desc: You want the quiz-backed path and then formal knowledge verification — calmly, as the next stage of learning.
education_preview.info_bar: After sign-in you unlock full lessons, quizzes with progress, and account tools — in one place, without changing how you learn.
